name: Riley Gold Corp.
description: Riley Gold Corp. is a mining exploration and development company headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, and listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol RLYG. The company focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-quality gold projects, primarily located within the prolific mining trends of Nevada, USA. With a leadership team experienced in the mining life cycle, Riley Gold aims to maximize shareholder value by advancing its assets, such as the Pipeline West/Clipper Gold Project, through strategic exploration and development initiatives in one of the world's most productive precious metals jurisdictions.
